checks.name: CEU_ACTION_ENGINE_10_ACTIONS
checks.detail: All 10 actions implemented: attach_evidence, reconcile, confirm, reject, merge, split, reclassify, create_obligation, resolve_obligation, classify_review

checks.name: NON_AUTOMATABLE_BOUNDARY
checks.detail: system:* actors hard-rejected from all CEU actions via isSystemActor() check

checks.name: AUTHORITY_VALIDATOR_ROLES
checks.detail: 5 roles enforced: operator (10 actions), reviewer (3), domain_authority (8), promotion_authority (0), audit_authority (0)

checks.name: STATE_PREREQUISITES
checks.detail: Each action validates candidate state prerequisite (e.g., ceu_reconcile requires EVIDENCE_ATTACHED, ceu_confirm requires RECONCILED)

checks.name: SNAPSHOT_ROLLBACK
checks.detail: CEUActionEngine performs deep clone snapshot before mutation, writes rollback on exception

checks.name: PROMOTION_GATE_RECOMPUTATION
checks.detail: Gate recomputed after every action: allResolved + unresolvedObls + reviewMode check

checks.name: REVIEW_MODE_GOVERNANCE
checks.detail: review_mode field added to reconciliation state. SYSTEM_TEST insufficient for promotion. OPERATOR_VALIDATED or DOMAIN_AUTHORITY_VALIDATED required. Downgrade prevention enforced

checks.name: NETBOX_FULL_RECONCILIATION
checks.detail: 12 confirmed, 1 merged (CEU-ACCOUNT → CEU-USERS), 3 obligations resolved, OPERATOR_VALIDATED, promotion gate OPEN

checks.name: GOVERNANCE_CORRECTION_APPLIED
checks.detail: Claude-driven reconciliation initially opened gate (SYSTEM_TEST). Corrected: gate requires review_mode >= OPERATOR_VALIDATED. RCEU-0034 governance correction event recorded

checks.name: BIDIRECTIONAL_OBLIGATION_LINEAGE
checks.detail: Obligations link to candidates (click to scroll+expand). Candidates show linked obligations inline. Obligation count badge on candidate header

checks.name: SSR_PAGE_RENDERS
checks.detail: ceu-reconciliation page loads without console errors, renders gate banner, candidate list, obligations, event timeline

checks.name: EVENT_LOG_APPEND_ONLY
checks.detail: All CEU events written to reconciliation_event_log.jsonl via CEUEventWriter, sequential RCEU-NNNN IDs, never overwritten

checks.name: LEARNING_EVENT_SPECIMEN
checks.detail: LRNE-0001 written to learning_events.jsonl — evidence intake gap for non-Django Python projects with full lineage fields

checks.name: NO_SEMANTIC_COMPILER_ACTIVATION
checks.detail: No semantic derivation compiler implemented or activated. Promotion gate opening is prerequisite only

checks.name: NO_S2_PROMOTION_ATTEMPTED
